summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 13 warning, 13 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/synthesize.mjs:148` — Double-loads extensions when called from a pipeline that already has a registry
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:212` — `runExecuteRun` duplicates timeout/circuit-breaker logic instead of reusing `callHook`
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:129` — Shallow copy doesn't protect nested objects from mutation by buggy extensions

🟡 `examples/extensions/log-phases.mjs:22` — Shell metacharacter injection via `ctx.taskTitle` interpolated into `sh -c` command; user-authored titles with shell metacharacters would execute arbitrary commands; use array-form spawn or document the risk

🟡 `.team/features/extension-system/tasks/task-24/handshake.json:7` — Summary says "702/702 tests passing" implying 702 total tests; actual total is 704 (702 pass, 2 skipped). Should read "702/704 tests passing (2 skipped, 0 failures)"
- 🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:262` — `MAX_ARTIFACT_BYTES` (10MB) truncation in `runExecuteRun` has no test coverage
- 🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:322` — `MAX_ARTIFACT_BYTES` truncation in `runArtifactEmit` has no test coverage
- 🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:551` — Extension calls in run.mjs lack try-catch wrappers; caller bugs in context construction would crash the feature run
- 🟡 `examples/extensions/log-phases.mjs:22` — Shell injection risk via `ctx.taskTitle` interpolated into `sh -c` command
🟡 `examples/extensions/log-phases.mjs:22` — Shell metacharacter injection via `${ctx.taskTitle}` interpolated into `sh -c` command; use array-form spawn or shell-escape the value
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:317` — Containment check uses `&&` where `||` is more precise; non-exploitable but logically imprecise
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:260` — `ext.name` used unsanitized in artifact path; add character whitelist

- The prior parallel review's two 🔴 [tester] findings are factually incorrect (misidentified 2 skipped tests as failures, and claimed a finalize test ENOENT that doesn't appear in the output) — they should not block merge
**All four veto categories cleared** — no 🔴 critical findings:
🟡 `test/extension-system.test.mjs:2207` — Source-assertion tests (regex on source strings) are fragile; variable renames break tests without breaking functionality
